inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 operating income $11.083M / 18.635M weighted shares (10-K); excludes consolidated-fund noise in net income
inputs.normalization_note: Owner cash = operating profit per share; not consolidated AUM balance sheet or 2024 one-time net income

optionality_gate.notes: Price above GAAP book; bear bounded by equity and cash; TPL AUM concentration is risk not balance-sheet floor

nav_overlay.notes: GAAP book reflects advisory platform equity; no TPL-style assigned-zero land on HKHC balance sheet

bear.notes: TPL-heavy AUM drawdown; fee growth stalls; digital-asset marks flat

base.notes: Advisory revenue +31% YoY FY2025; normalize operating margin mid-cycle

bull.notes: AUM growth + operating leverage; crypto/digital marks supportive

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Book is advisory platform equity; not land-at-cost pattern

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: Digital-asset marks ($0.8M loss FY2025) inside consolidated P&L; immaterial vs fees

option_scan.question: Private stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: Consolidated investment products and preferred/private sleeves on balance sheet; look-through not fully disclosed

option_scan.question: Embedded option in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: 65% of AUM in TPL Dec 2025 — fee stream tied to client book performance

marvin_floor.notes: Lawrence full on normalized operating owner cash; no approved third party in base

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence envelope)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence envelope)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

qualitative_adjustments.factor: No dated predictive attribute at spot
qualitative_adjustments.rationale: Scarcity is descriptive; no timed mispricing catalyst in base
qualitative_adjustments.falsifier: Cross-check names dated catalyst with timeline

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative

growth_explanation.mechanism: Advisory fee revenue scales with client AUM; FY2025 revenue +31% YoY; concentration in TPL drives fee beta
